user.title: Connect to HestiaClaw
user.description: Enter the URL of your HestiaClaw instance and the voice token shown in the add-on logs.

data.token: Voice Token (leave empty if no token is set)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to HestiaClaw. Make sure the add-on is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid voice token. Check HESTIA_VOICE_TOKEN in the add-on logs.
